name: Creatext — Front-end Engineer (Freelance)
description: Creatext is a Berlin-based start-up that generates relevant and personalized messages for prospects using a self-developed artificial intelligence. As a freelance front-end engineer (March 2022 – April 2022), I joined the team as the only front-end engineer at the early stage of the web app: integrating new pages and components following the roadmap and implementing a coherent data-flow through the application.
